untranslatable_reason: The signal requires validation of fundamental analysis contradicting consensus and measurement of trader backtested accuracy (>50% on contrarian setups), neither of which can be expressed using only price-based technical indicators. Fundamental validation and historical accuracy metrics require external data sources outside the allowed indicator set. The sentiment deviation threshold (>1.0 std dev) has been approximated using india_vix as a proxy for market sentiment extremes, but this is not a precise technical equivalent.
translation_notes: Approximated 'market hysteria' as india_vix > 1.0 standard deviations from mean (proxy). Used RSI extremes (<30 for long contrarian, >70 for short contrarian) as mechanical sentiment proxy. Stop loss set to 15% per parameters. Hold minimum 75 bars per parameters. Critical missing elements: fundamental validation source check and trader accuracy requirement cannot be encoded in technical rules alone. Position sizing (max 3.5%) must be enforced at execution layer, not in signal rules.
